default.heading: Lowball Marketplace
default.body: Welcome to the world's most ridiculous marketplace!

default.heading: Browse and Bid
default.body: Absurd items appear with asking prices. Place your lowball bid, but don't go so low it gets rejected!

default.heading: Read the Clues
default.body: Each item has condition and description hints. Use them to guess the hidden reserve price.

default.heading: Closest Accepted Offer Wins
default.body: You want the lowest bid that still clears the reserve. Smart cheapness beats wild guessing.

default.heading: Results Matter
default.body: Watch what everyone offered and learn how close your lowball landed.

classic.heading: Browse and Bid

funny_messages.heading: Lowball Marketplace
funny_messages.body: This time the goal is comedy. Write the funniest buyer message you can.

funny_messages.heading: Study the Item
funny_messages.body: You still get a ridiculous listing, but now it is fuel for your joke instead of a price guess.

funny_messages.heading: Write the Pitch
funny_messages.body: Send the most absurd lowball message you can dream up, like a chaotic buyer in the wild.

funny_messages.heading: Watch the Reveal
funny_messages.body: All the messages get shown on the big screen, so commit to the bit.

funny_messages.heading: Vote for the Funniest
funny_messages.body: Pick the message that made the room laugh the hardest.
